sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER.
sections.passage_or_context:
WEST BAY HOTEL – DETAILS OF JOB
• Newspaper advert for temporary staff
• Vacancies for (1) _______
• Two shifts
• Can choose your (2) _______

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Community groups are mainly concerned about
options: A pedestrian safety
B traffic jams
C increased pollution

questions.content: It has been decided that the overhead power lines will be
options: A extended
B buried
C repaired

questions.content: The expenses related to the power lines will be paid by
options: A the council
B the power company
C local businesses

sections.instruction: Label the map below. Write the correct letter A-H next to questions 14-20.

questions.content: In which TWO ways is Dan financing his course?
options: A He is receiving money from the government
B His family are willing to help him
C The college is giving him a small grant
D His local council is supporting him for a limited period
E A former employer is providing partial funding

questions.content: Which TWO reasons does Jeannie give for deciding to leave some college clubs?
options: A She is not sufficiently challenged
B The activity interferes with her studies
C She does not have enough time
D The activity is too demanding physically
E She does not think she is any good at the activity

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.content: What does Dan say about the seminars on the course?
options: A The other students do not give him a chance to speak
B The seminars make him feel inferior to the other students
C The preparation for seminars takes too much time

questions.content: What does Jeannie say about the tutorials on the course?
options: A They are an inefficient way of providing guidance
B They are more challenging than she had expected
C They are helping her to develop her study skills

sections.instruction: Complete the flow chart below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER.
sections.passage_or_context:
Advice on exam preparations
Step 1: Make sure you know the exam requirements
Step 2: Find some past papers
Step 3: Work out your (27)…………for revision and write them on a card
Step 4: Make a (28)……………and keep it in view
Step 5: Divide revision into (29)…………….for each day
Step 6: Write one (30)…………….about each topic
Step 7: Practice writing some exam answers

questions.content: Work out your {{BLANK}} for revision and write them on a card
Make a {{BLANK}} and keep it in view
Divide revision into {{BLANK}} for each day

sections.instruction: Which painting styles have the following features? Write the correct letter A, B or C next to questions 31-36.
sections.passage_or_context:
Australian Aboriginal Rock Paintings
Painting Styles:
A Dynamic
B Yam
C Modern

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
sections.passage_or_context:
RAINBOW SERPENT PROJECT
Aim of project: to identify the (37) _______ used as the basis for the Rainbow Serpent
Yam Period:
• Environmental changes led to higher (38) _______
• Traditional activities were affected especially (39) _______
Rainbow Serpent Image:
• Similar to a sea horse
• Unusual because it appeared in inland areas
• Symbolises (40) _______ in Aboriginal culture

questions.content: to identify the {{BLANK}} used as the basis for the Rainbow Serpent
